rulings.Case Title: HSBC BANK USA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TRUSTEE FOR VS. KEYHAN MOHANNA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, December 14, 2016 line 1. DEFENDANT KEYHAN MOHANNA's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND DENIED. Motion is untimely and Defendant fails to meet the requirements under CCP 473. Defendant cites no authority for the proposition that default may be vacated per CCP 526 and 527.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANNA GATTI VS. CHARLES FERGUSON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order To Seal Court Records, Or In The Alternative, To Allow Redacted Documents To Be Filed
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, December 14, 2016 line 2. PLAINTIFF ANNA GATTI's Motion For An Order To Seal Court Records, Or In The Alternative, To Allow Redacted Documents To Be Filed GRANTED as follows: (1) Exhibits 9, 14 and 23 shall be sealed; (2) Account numbers shall be redacted from exhibits 2(C), 2(D), 2(K), 10, 11, 16, 17, 18, 19, and 25. Moving party to prepare redacted documents.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RIAN ADAMS ET AL VS. BAY CITY FINANCIAL CORP., AKA BAY CITIES PROPERT ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, December 14, 2016 line 5. DEFENDANT 376 ELLIS STREET, LLC, MONICA HUJAZI, SF CORNERS, LLC's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Sustained in part and overruled in part. Monica Hudjazi demurrer as to Adams, White, Perkyns, and Livingstone's causes of action is sustained and the action is stayed as to these Plaintiffs only for them to obtain a determination from the Bankruptcy Court whether any, part, or all of their claims fall within the scope of automatic stay. In re Mariage of Sprague & Spiegel-Sprague (2003) 105 Cal.App.4th 215. (The Court notes that no exhibits were attached to Defendant's Request for Judicial Notice filed on November 10, 2016. Plaintiff did not dispute the fact of bankruptcy filing on March 1, 2013). Demurrer is otherwise overruled.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CAN TANG YU ET AL VS. MICHAEL HO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Petition Of Plaintiffs And Cross-Defendants Can Tang Yu, Yan Wang, And Sunway Floors Cabinets Inc. To Compel Arbitration, Consolidate Arbitration Proceedings, And Stay Action Pending Conclusion Of Arbitration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, December 14, 2016 line 6. PLAINTIFF CAN YU, YAN WANG and SUNWAY FLOOR CABINETS INC.'s Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration, Consolidate Arbitration Proceedings, And Stay Action Pending Conclusion Of Arbitration GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. To the extent this motion since to compel arbitration of the unlawful detainer action and consolidation with unlawful detainer action, the motion is DENIED as moot. Summary judgment granted on November 4, 2016. Motion to compel arbitration in this action is GRANTED. Even though Plaintiff failed to explain the 4 month delay in seeking to compel arbitration of this action, Defendants failed to show any prejudice in this action, as required under Doers v. Golden Gate Bridge Dist. (1979) 23 Cal.3d 180 and Saint Agnes Medical Center v. Pacificare of California (2003) 31 Cal.4th 1187.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CARA E. VAINISH VS. MATTHEW L. KLEIN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, December 14, 2016 line 7. Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction GRANTED as follows, Preliminary Injunction shall remain in effect on the terms listed in October 25, 2016 order until further order of the Court. Parties are to promptly arrange for a DBI inspection. Within 10 days of receipt of DBI report, Plaintiff shall file and calendar per CCP 1005 a hearing addressing the need for further injunction and other relief, if necessary. All rents shall be deposited into joint account within 2 business days of receipt until the case is resolved. No payments/withdrawals other than ordinary property expenses (e.g. taxes, utilities) shall be made out of the joint account without written consent of both parties. Hearing required to address December 2016 rent. Defendant to provide declaration by no later than 9:00 a.m. on December 14, 2016 addressing (1) when December rent was received; (2) in what manner (cash, check, direct deposit, etc.); (3) when and where is has been deposited.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, December 14, 2016 line 9. DEFENDANT MATT NIELSON's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff failed to acknowledge or address Defendant's third basis for demurrer, conceding it.= (501/REQ)
